transcripts.transcript: All right, so a couple of quick details about my exercise routine. Um, I've done, my favorite sport is Brazilian jiu-jitsu, but I'm still a white belt, zero stripes, and I kind of suck at it. And I've found that it's very expensive and um I have always always seemed to come up with excuses to stop doing it for seasons and then I restart and then I forget everything and have to relearn it. And I still want to, when my life slows down at some point, give it more attention, but right now there always seems to be something that comes up to get in the way, which is a bummer. And I don't know how I feel about that. But, um, otherwise I go to Gold's Gym. I mean, in general, I struggle with doing exercise daily, and that's one of the parts of my life that feels most disjointed and like it needs to be fixed. I go to Gold's Gym currently and I try to go every day, but I don't always, and Um, you know, right now. I'm, I have a weird schedule with my co-parenting where I am with the kids half the week and not with the kids the other half of the week with somewhat consistency. Um, and, um, ultimately, when I go to the gym, I like to run, and I've lost some weight recently, um, and I'm able to run better than I have in the past few years. But I'm still getting back into the routine of running and like cause I, I love running and I probably should run a lot more. I love running in the trails, especially in Richmond. But otherwise I go to Gold's gym and I do, I jump rope. I do, I hit the heavy bag. I do shadow boxing. I do a little bit of yoga, and I run on the treadmill basically, and then I sit in the sauna for 15 minutes. The whole thing takes about an, you know, an hour total to get in and out. Um, and, and I do that after I drop the kids off from school, but I need to come up with a better routine. Um, but that's my workout situation. I need to take way better care of my body, and I'm 37 and I'm aging and I need to do, I really also wanna do weights, so I wanna do have some sort of weight routine where I'm lifting heavy weights. But I'm just feel a little uncomfortable doing that and so, you know, I'm trying to figure out how to break past that. I probably, if I could wave my magic wand, I would order some home weights, but I don't have my own house. I'm living with my parents right now, um, and need to get a new home ASAP, but that's a whole another process. But that's my workout situation.
